description_long: This object is a compact, submachine gun-style weapon with a matte black finish and a minimalist, utilitarian design. It features a long, slender barrel with a simple front sight and a prominent, vertical box magazine positioned in front of the trigger guard. The stock is a skeletal, folding metal type, providing lightweight support and easy portability. The receiver and handguard are blocky and robust, with minimal external controls visible. The grip is angled and ergonomic, designed for one-handed or two-handed operation. The overall construction suggests a focus on durability and ease of use in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a folding metal stock, vertical box magazine, and simple iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the weapon, folding metal stock, vertical box magazine, and angled grip.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the skeletal metal stock and the narrow profile of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel, front sight, and the open structure of the folding stock.
